channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Exploring the confluence of tech and sustainability for a better future
item.description: Sustainability efforts are gathering steam on a global scale, with governments and organizations levying their might behind measures to formulate and implement policies that can stop or even reverse global environmental damage and create positive impact for local communities.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Opinion: The tech fantasy that powers AI is running on fumes
item.description: We were promised life-changing transformations. Instead we get a mid-level technology that helps us write emails.
item.dc:creator: Tressie McMillan Cottom, The Mercury News

item.title: The future of AI search is Google’s to lose
item.description: When Google unveiled a new neural network design in 2017 called the Transformer architecture, it probably had no idea this would threaten Google Search’s dominance within seven years. When OpenAI applied Google’s Transformer architecture to generative language models, the GPT was born.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google’s new Battery Health assistance will intentionally shorten your Pixel 9a’s battery life – and you can’t turn the feature off
item.description: The Google Pixel 9a has a new feature that will intentionally reduce your phone’s battery life over time.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Lenovo accidentally leaks Nvidia RTX 5060 Ti and 5060 models in a desktop PC, suggesting these GPUs are close to release
item.description: Lenovo desktop PC has been spotted with RTX 5060 models, suggesting Nvidia might get these GPUs out ahead of AMD’s RX 9060 rivals.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New MLCommons benchmarks to test AI infrastructure performance
item.description: Industry consortium MLCommons has released new versions of its MLPerf Inference benchmarks, offering a closer look at how current-generation data center and edge hardware performs under increasingly demanding AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta and UFC team up to bring AI and VR to fans
item.description: UFC is joining up with Facebook’s parent company Meta in a deal that will bring mixed martial arts to more fans around the world.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GenAI is already transforming the healthcare industry
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is quickly transforming healthcare, according to a survey by consultancy McKinsey & Co. released today. The survey of 150 healthcare industry organizations found 85% are exploring or had already adopted genAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: United receives FAA certification on Starlink-equipped aircraft
item.description: United has received FAA approval for a Starlink-equipped plane. The first commercial flight is set for May.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, NewsNation

item.title: Splunk launches inventory tool to simplify OpenTelemetry monitoring
item.description: Splunk this week announced a new Service Inventory product that uses OpenTelemetry to offer a comprehensive view into service instrumentation, which the observability company says will solve a critical pain point in modern infrastructure monitoring by providing visibility across cloud and Kubernetes
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Plug and Play AI startup incubator launches downtown San Jose tech hub
item.description: A new artificial intelligence center of excellence has officially launched in downtown San Jose and picked its first location.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Vapes aren’t just for smoking anymore—now they’re digital toys
item.description: Vaping devices are getting a makeover—one that seems likely to turn more teens into consumers. Experts have long worried that nicotine vapes appeal to minors with flavors like Cotton Candy and Blue Razz, along with bright candy-colored designs. Today’s vapes double as digital gadgets.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Apple TV+ has discovered the Fountain of Youth and you can jump in this May when the movie starts streaming
item.description: Fountain of Youth is an epic new adventure coming to Apple TV+ directed by Guy Ritchie and comes from the writer of Scream.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bad news, foldable fans – the rumored Samsung Galaxy tri-fold phone could be harder to get hold of than we first thought
item.description: A new rumor suggests the Samsung Galaxy G Fold – Samsung’s long-rumored tri-fold phone – may only launch in China and Korea, leaving fans elsewhere without a tri-fold option.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Nintendo announces Switch 2 release date, new features in latest Direct showcase
item.description: And it's coming with a load of new features ranging from 4K, 120 frames per second support, a new LCD screen.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Tesla sales drop 13% in first quarter as Elon Musk backlash, aging models hurt demand
item.description: The double-digit drop is likely due to a combination of factors, including its aging lineup, competition from rivals and a backlash from Musk’s embrace of right wing politics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: President Donald Trump’s executive orders have spurred more than 130 lawsuits, but one related to TikTok barely generates a peep.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini And Mark Sherman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rewriting Social Security will be a train wreck
item.description: Government software development is a curious business. When I was a student at the Naval Postgraduate School, I wrote a paper called “There is a Lot of Money to be Made Writing Bad Software for the Federal Government.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Making Python faster won’t be easy, but it’ll be worth it
item.description: Want to make a Python user grind their teeth? Just recite three words: Python is slow. In many of the ways that matter, it’s true.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: HTMX and Alpine.js: How to combine two great, lean front ends
item.description: HTMX and Alpine are two low-overhead ways to empower your front end. Neither requires a build step, and both let you add Ajax-style API calls and client-side UI updates with minimal fuss.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Red Hat Developer Hub adds analysis dashboard
item.description: Red Hat has updated Red Hat Developer Hub, an enterprise internal developer portal based on Backstage. The new release offers a developer preview of Adoption Insights, an analytical dashboard that details how Developer Hub is being used by development teams.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta's head of AI research stepping down
item.description: The head of Meta’s artificial intelligence research division said she plans to step down, vacating a high-profile position at the parent company of Facebook and Instagram at a time of intense competition in the development of AI technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kickstarter isn’t just for indie passion projects anymore
item.description: Despite a triumphant world premiere at Cannes last May, the politically unsparing Donald Trump biopic The Apprentice was stuck in cinematic limbo.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boebert to introduce resolution condemning Tesla vehicle attacks
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) introduced a Tuesday resolution condemning violent attacks on Tesla vehicles. “The definition of terrorism is the unlawful use of violence and intimidation in the pursuit of political aims.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Understand Python’s new lock file format
item.description: Python Enhancement Proposal (PEP) 751 gives Python a new file format for specifying dependencies. This file, called a lock file, promises to allow developers to reproduce the installation of their Python projects, with the exact same sets of dependencies, from system to system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple Releases macOS Sequoia 15.4 with AI-Boosted Email Categorization
item.description: Apple's newly-released macOS Sequoia 15.4 comes with security updates, support for Apple Intelligence across most major languages, and new AI tools for Mail.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Preserving Precious Voicemails on Android and iPhone
item.description: Learn how to save voicemails on your Android and iPhone devices, preserving special moments and voices that matter most.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASA finds generative AI can’t be trusted
item.description: Although many C-suite and line-of-business (LOB) execs are doing everything they can to focus on generative AI (genAI) efficiency and flexibility — and not about how often the technology delivers wrong answers — IT decision-makers can’t afford to do the same thing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI agents can (and will) be scammed
item.description: Generative AI’s newest superstars — independent-acting agents — are on a tear. Organizations are adopting the technology at a staggering rate because they can use APIs or be embedded with standard apps and automate all kinds of business processes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Volcano erupts in southwestern Iceland after a nearby town and spa are evacuated
item.description: A volcano in southwestern Iceland that has erupted repeatedly for more than a year again belched lava and smoke into the air, just hours after authorities evacuated the few remaining residents of a nearby fishing village.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Microsoft adds data agents to Fabric to help business users with analytics
item.description: Microsoft is adding new data agents to Fabric, its cloud-based offering combining data warehousing, data science, data engineering, and data analytics services. Its goal is to help business users find insights in enterprise data without the help of a business analyst.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Google’s Scott Frohman on restoring symmetry to the cyber fight
item.description: The cloud, AI and zero trust can help DoD and the services better protect their networks from cyberattacks, says Google Public Sector’s defense programs leader.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
